subject: Refactor SOL003 Adapter to organize its modules
commit_message:
Refactor SOL003 Adapter to organize its modules

based on functions

Change-Id: I7a1c172974ab5910b0c6b069dcf8c48f9893de37
Issue-ID: SO-2771
Signed-off-by: waqas.ikram <waqas.ikram@est.tech>
